feed.title: Google Cloud: Pub/Sub Lite
feed.subtitle: Changelog for Google Cloud product: Pub/Sub Lite

entry.content: The Pub/Sub Lite to Managed Service for Apache Kafka migration guide has been updated to use the latest client libraries and to use Kafka Connect in Managed Service for Apache Kafka.
entry.summary: The migration guide for moving from Pub/Sub Lite to Managed Service for Apache Kafka has been updated. This revision incorporates the latest client libraries and leverages Kafka Connect for a more streamlined migration process.
entry.title: Announcement: Updated Pub/Sub Lite to Kafka Migration Guide
